creator: nc@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 150029
Updated patch for security/tor 0.2.5.10

Hi,
I uploaded an updated patch to update security/tor to 0.2.5.10. This patch does work. I will also upload the Poudriere build logs for this patch, as well as the updated patch and the Poudriere Build Log for security/tor 0.2.6.1-alpha.
Thanks,
Neel.
